goal: Launch a pre-built warehouse/AMR demo scene in under 2 minutes for Raj's client pitch call.
thoughts: No teaching, no customization. quick_demo is the one-shot. Pick warehouse AMR preset because the client cares about logistics. If quick_demo fails, fall back to list_scene_templates and load the closest match. Skip run_stage_analysis unless Raj asks.
code:
# One shot. Pick demo aligned with client vertical.
quick_demo(demo_name="<WAREHOUSE_AMR_PRESET>")

# If that errors, enumerate real templates and pick closest
list_scene_templates()  # only on failure
# load_scene_template(template_name="<FALLBACK_TEMPLATE>")
failure_modes: Picking a manipulation demo when client said AMR
Demo asset streams slowly — must pre-warm before call
Invented demo_name that is not in the registry
